pattern_1.transformation: Convert to ISO 8601 UTC format. Source format: '%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p' (12-hour AM/PM). Timezone: America/Denver (Mountain Time, UTC-7 MDT / UTC-6 MST).
Parse float j from the column name suffix '*_at_jcm' by splitting on '_' and stripping 'cm' from the last element.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: Divide by 1e2 to convert from cm to m.

pattern_1.transformation: Look up 'Lat ' (note trailing space in column name) for 'site_id' (from 'Name' column) in SM_loc.csv. site_id is the data filename stem (e.g., 'ER_SMN1' from 'ER_SMN1.csv').
pattern_1.unit_conversion: None; source units are WGS84 decimal degrees.

pattern_1.transformation: Look up 'Lon' for 'site_id' (from 'Name' column) in SM_loc.csv.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: None; source units are WGS84 decimal degrees.

pattern_1.transformation: Parse integer i from the 5th underscore-delimited token of the column name 'm3_m3_Water_Content_i_at_jcm' (0-indexed position 4 after split on '_'). Where i=1 → replicate 1, i=2 → replicate 2.
Parse site_id from source filename stem (e.g., 'ER_SMN1' from 'ER_SMN1.csv') using re.sub(r'\.csv$', '', filename).
Not reported in source; populate with np.nan.
Coerce from wide format with column variables containing depth (j) and replicate (i) information to long format with separate columns for depth_m, replicate, and volumetric_water_content_m3_m3.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: None; source units are m3/m3 (confirmed by 'm3_m3_' prefix in column names).
